title: Mars Overworld
description: This transforms the overworld to mars!
body:
# 🪐 Welcome to the MARS OVERWORLD MOD! 🚀
> 🌟 A brand new experience awaits!
> Ever wanted to explore Mars without leaving the Overworld? Now you can!
> This mod transforms the familiar Overworld into a harsh, red Martian landscape — complete with dusty skies, no water, and terrain straight out of the planet mars!
> 
🔥 Features:
- 🌋 Replaces Overworld terrain with Mars-style terrain
- 🌫️ Orange sky and fog for a realistic Martian vibe
- 🌵 No water, no trees – just dust, rock, and survival

## 📜 Lore

In the year 2125, the first wave of terraformers arrived—but something went wrong.
What was meant to be a lush, habitable world turned into a rust-colored wasteland.
Now, decades later, the once-hopeful colonies lie abandoned, half-buried in Martian dust. Do you dare to survive the harsh condidtions of this world?

## 🙂 HOPE YOU ENJOY!!
Feedback and suggestions are always welcome!
